description: Export the complete Life Cycle Inventory (LCI) for natural gas-fired electricity generation using the USLCI database imported from ~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip. Perform an inventory analysis for the natural gas electricity generation process (e.g., "Electricity, at power plant, natural gas") and export the resulting elementary flows to ~/LCA_Results/electricity_lci_inventory.csv. Additionally, create a summary report at ~/LCA_Results/lci_summary_report.txt listing the top 10 elementary flows by mass/amount, including flow name, compartment, and amount.
